---
title: "acquire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\acquire.py"
loc: 77
complexity: 7
logic_score: 3.10
style_score: 3.61
intel_score: 7.63
overall_score: 4.56
---

## Intent
The `acquire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SkillAcquirer, _slugify, hunt_and_forge, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SkillAcquirer, _slugify, hunt_and_forge, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 33 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)
- [src.tools.brave_search](file://src.tools.brave_search)

### Exports
- `SkillAcquirer`
- `_slugify`
- `hunt_and_forge`
- `main`
